untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern detection (height/width measurement relative to median thresholds) and pattern shape classification (tall/short/narrow/wide). These are structural chart pattern recognition features not available in the allowed indicator set. The source data appears incomplete/corrupted (Table 11.6 truncated), preventing accurate parameter extraction. Pattern geometry computation requires custom technical analysis beyond standard price/volume indicators.
translation_notes: BULKOWSKI_DRY_0 describes a chart pattern analysis based on rectangle/consolidation dimensions. Entry conditions require: (1) Pattern height measurement vs historical median, (2) Pattern width measurement vs historical median, (3) Directional breakout confirmation. Success rates vary significantly by market regime and direction (43% bull up tall vs -63% bear down tall). Without pattern detection capability, only basic directional signals can be inferred. Recommend implementing custom pattern scanner module for accurate backtesting.
